So everyone, so I wanted to make the next three quick videos about customer service. So what do you do if a customer wants to refund, change the flavor, delay payments, change the shipping or billing info or change the card info, whatever. What you should do is tell them to call 1-800-470-7560 or they can email support at prestigelabs.com. And depending on when you're watching this video, if it has already released to all of legacy, then they will also be able to chat in prestigelabs.com. But if it has not released to all of legacy yet, then the first two options will be their primary options of doing anything that they need to do. The call will probably be the easiest because then they'll get one of our team on the phone. So I would just recommend they do that so that they get the exceptional customer service that hopefully you guys are also accustomed to.
